howItWorks.intro: This music lesson pricing calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Lesson Rate
rules.formula: Rate = Base x Length Multiplier x Location Multiplier x Cost-of-Living Multiplier
rules.explanation: Your experience-based rate adjusted for lesson duration, teaching location, and local market.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much should I charge for music lessons?
faq.a: Rates vary from $30-$120 per hour based on experience, location, and instrument. Research local competitors and price based on your qualifications.

faq.q: Should I charge less for online lessons?
faq.a: Online lessons typically go for 10-15% less since you have no travel time or studio overhead, but the convenience can justify full rates.

howWeCalculate.intro: This music lesson pricing calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
